products.name: SIE Brushless Boom Barrier — 2nd Gen
products.desc: 140 W brushless DC, 56.8 Nm, 1.5–8 s adjustable, IP44, straight/telescopic/folding boom. 2-year warranty.

products.name: SIE16 Garage Door Opener
products.desc: 1600 N belt-drive ceiling opener, soft start-stop, auto-reverse, rolling-code remotes. For doors up to 16 m².

products.name: SIE Tubular Shutter Motor
products.desc: Tubular motor with manual override for motorising rolling shutters. Includes wall switch; remote kit optional.

products.name: SIE Rolling-Code Remote (Pair)
products.desc: 433 MHz rolling-code remotes compatible with SIE gate, shutter and barrier receivers. Sold as a pair.
